Let me start by saying, most of the time when I scroll through my YT feed, I skip right over videos under 25 minutes or so.  My logic being, if someone is telling me they have the secret to life, it better take more than 25 minutes to tell me.  That being said, when I watch your vidoes I feel like I've been watching one video for an hour.  That's how clear, concise, and straightforward your content is and I thank you for just simply relaying your experience to the rest of us.  Well done. 🤟

Great video! Thank you! I'm adding it to Tradingview and look forward to seeing it in my repertoire of indicators! So far, back testing, it's showing some good promise. Like watching a rubber band get stretched and then back to center.

This is the first time I fully understood the psychological interpretation of VWAP. You're truly an amazing teacher.

WHY ARE YOU GAY

I've built an indicator that anchors vwap to the previous days low and one from the high, same for previous week high and low and previous months, the logic is that a high is formed when sellers take control and a low is formed when buyers take control. So at the start of the day I can see if the price is getting accepted above the vwap,  from the high, bullish or below the vwap from the low, bearish, or in-between both, range. I'm also looking for reactions at the weekly band and monthly band.  I also like the rolling 1h and 6h vwap.
